'''ât-k-y-n''' ('''katakyenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waiment|waiment]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waiment|waiment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-k-y-n
|-
! Lemma
| katakyenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakyenoko|thitakyenoko]] || [[word:jitakyenoko|jitakyenoko]] || [[word:shitakyenoko|shitakyenoko]] || [[word:kitakyenoko|kitakyenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakyenoko|thotakyenoko]] || [[word:jotakyenoko|jotakyenoko]] || [[word:shotakyenoko|shotakyenoko]] || [[word:kotakyenoko|kotakyenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtakyenoko|thĂŠtakyenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtakyenoko|jĂŠtakyenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtakyenoko|shĂŠtakyenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtakyenoko|kĂŠtakyenoko]]
|-

|-

|}
